testCases.scenario: AC1: Fill signup form and register — POSITIVE (DESTRUCTIVE)
testCases.testCase: Complete the 2-step signup with valid data; server accepts the registration
testSteps: Fill all step-1 required fields with valid data
testCases.testData:
Restaurant: MoonGherkinDestr<ts>
Email: arslan.moon+destr-<ts>@yopmail.com
Password: TestPass!2025
testCases.expectedResult: URL leaves /signup; server accepted the registration
testCases.linkedTestTitle: AC1-POS-01 — successful 2-step signup creates a new tenant

testCases.scenario: AC2: Verify the user is registered — POSITIVE (DESTRUCTIVE)
testCases.testCase: After Create Account, three independent post-registration signals hold
testSteps: Complete the full 2-step signup with valid data
Verify the 'Restaurant: <name>' paragraph references the new restaurant
testCases.expectedResult: All three signals hold simultaneously
testCases.linkedTestTitle: AC2-POS-01 — after registration the post-signup screen confirms the new restaurant

testCases.scenario: Step 1 validation — required field missing (Restaurant Name)
testCases.testCase: Submit step 1 with Restaurant Name empty
testSteps: Fill all other required step-1 fields
testCases.expectedResult: Form does not advance; step-1 heading still visible
testCases.linkedTestTitle: NEG-01 — Restaurant Name empty: Next does not advance

testCases.scenario: Step 1 validation — required field missing (Full Name)
testCases.testCase: Submit step 1 with Full Name empty
testSteps: Fill all step-1 fields except Full Name
testCases.expectedResult: Form does not advance; step-1 heading still visible

testCases.scenario: Step 1 validation — required field missing (Business Email)
testCases.testCase: Submit step 1 with Business Email empty
testSteps: Fill all step-1 fields except Business Email
testCases.expectedResult: Form does not advance; step-1 heading still visible
testCases.linkedTestTitle: NEG-03 — Business Email empty: Next does not advance

testCases.testCase: Submit with Business Email missing '@'
testCases.expectedResult: Email field reports HTML5 typeMismatch; form does not advance
testCases.linkedTestTitle: NEG-04 — Invalid email format is rejected by HTML5 validity

testCases.testCase: Submit step 1 with letters in Phone Number
testCases.expectedResult: Validation rejects or input strips non-digits

testCases.testCase: Submit step 1 with an email already registered
testSteps: Fill all step-1 fields using the already-registered email
Click Next; complete step 2 if reached
testCases.expectedResult: Server rejects with 'Email already in use'

testCases.testCase: Subdomain is read-only and auto-derives (kebab-cased) from Restaurant Name
testCases.expectedResult: Subdomain ∈ /^[a-z0-9-]+$/; contains 'my' + 'eatery'
testCases.linkedTestTitle: NEG-07 — Subdomain auto-derives from Restaurant Name and is read-only

testCases.testCase: Mismatching passwords prevent submission
testCases.expectedResult: URL stays on /signup; step-2 heading still visible
testCases.linkedTestTitle: NEG-08 — Create Account does not submit when passwords mismatch

testCases.testCase: Step 2 enforces a minimum password length
testSteps: Enter a short password (e.g., 'abc') in both fields
testCases.expectedResult: Validation: minimum-length not met; submission blocked

testCases.testCase: Create Account is disabled until Terms is checked
testSteps: Fill Password + Confirm with matching values
testCases.expectedResult: Create Account button is disabled
testCases.linkedTestTitle: NEG-10 — Create Account is disabled when Terms checkbox is unchecked

testCases.testCase: Subdomain, Location Name, Address fields are read-only
testCases.expectedResult: All three have the readonly attribute
testCases.linkedTestTitle: UI-01 — Subdomain, Location Name, and Address fields are read-only

testCases.testCase: Next reflects validity of step-1 required fields in real time
testSteps: Observe Next state at each step
testCases.expectedResult: Next is disabled when any required field is empty; enables once all valid

testCases.testCase: Show/Hide password button toggles the input type
testCases.expectedResult: Click 1: type='text'; click 2: type='password'
testCases.linkedTestTitle: UI-03 — Show/Hide password toggle works on step 2

testCases.testCase: Clicking Back returns to step 1 with values intact
testCases.expectedResult: Step 1 reappears with all editable values intact

testCases.testCase: 'Sign in' link navigates to /login
testCases.expectedResult: URL ends with /login

testCases.testCase: '← Back' link navigates to homepage
testCases.expectedResult: Browser navigates to /
testCases.linkedTestTitle: NAV-02 — "← Back" link navigates to the homepage

testCases.testCase: Restaurant Name with leading/trailing whitespace
testSteps: Enter '   My Eatery   ' in Restaurant Name
testCases.expectedResult: App trims whitespace; subdomain reflects the trimmed name

testCases.testCase: Restaurant Name with special characters
testSteps: Enter 'My Eatery & Café (2026)!' in Restaurant Name
testCases.expectedResult: Subdomain is URL-safe slug only

testCases.testCase: Disposable email (yopmail) accepted or rejected with clear message
testCases.expectedResult: Either accepted or explicitly rejected

testCases.testCase: Subdomain collision with existing tenant
testCases.expectedResult: Server rejects: 'Subdomain already in use'

testCases.testCase: Password fields use type='password' (masked in DOM)
testCases.expectedResult: Both default to type='password'
testCases.linkedTestTitle: UI-03 — Show/Hide password toggle works on step 2

testCases.testCase: Form posts over HTTPS
testCases.expectedResult: Submission goes to an https:// endpoint

testCases.testCase: XSS payload in Restaurant Name is sanitized
testSteps: Complete signup and observe post-signup screen
testCases.expectedResult: No alert; value escaped or rejected

testCases.testCase: Password not echoed in DOM or response after submit
testSteps: Search DOM and HTTP responses for the password string
testCases.expectedResult: Password not found in DOM or any response body
